criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: Specific Dropout layer with p=0.5, 1-4 percentage points, named benchmarks, named alternative L2.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Five rungs build logically. Minor: ensemble interpretation rung is optional but legitimate.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Names p, zeroing, weight scaling, expected pre-activation match, co-adaptation, ensemble framing.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: Most jargon defined inline. Minor: 'element-wise' not defined for intro audience.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Net diagrams highly specific. Ensemble tree grandchildren described loosely.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Timeline logical. Net_full from t=0 never erased -- canvas density risk in test-time section.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Three distinct draws plus highlights and writes. Excellent variety.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: Core formulas correct. Narration phrasing 'expected input is p times larger than during training' has the wrong scalar direction (should be 1/p larger).

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: PyTorch snippet syntactically valid, demonstrates train/eval toggle directly.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: Nine beats over 210s, ~23s/beat. No beat overloaded. Minor: beat at 105 covers two ideas.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Tight focus. Mild bookending of the 1-4pp number.

topThreeIssues: Math direction error: narration says 'expected input is p times larger' at test time -- correct direction is 1/p times larger (training activations are p times smaller)
Canvas clutter: net_full from t=0 is never erased; test-time section overlays new equations on a busy canvas
Ensemble tree grandchildren described as 'smaller unit subsets' without naming the actual subsets -- specify h1/h3/h2/h4 explicitly
summary: 93/100 across all criteria: payoff numerically concrete, staircase tight, destination symbolically precise, board specific. Single most important fix is a directional error in test-time scaling narration that could teach the wrong mental model.
